title: Plus numeros

teach.target: Nos ha mille libros in le schola.
teach.roman: nos ha mille libros in le schola
teach.english: We have a thousand books in the school.
teach.ipa: nˈos ha mˈile lˈibros ˈin le stʃˈola

grammar.title: Bigger numbers
grammar.body:
Round hundreds just add **-s** to cento: duo centos (200), tres centos (300), cinque centos (500) — same plural rule as everything else.
**mille** (1000) doesn't change for a plural count: duo mille (2000). **million** does: duo milliones (two million).

teach.target: Illa es le tertie in su classe.
teach.roman: illa es le tertie in su classe
teach.english: She is third in her class.
teach.ipa: ˈila es le tˈertje ˈin su klˈase

canDo: Use ordinals beyond first and second
